achievements.title: Ready for Some Elevator Action?

achievements.title: Nearing the End
achievements.description: Complete all 4 scenes of stage 3.

achievements.title: Dexter's Secret Weapon
achievements.description: Complete all 4 scenes of stage 1 while playing as Robo Suit 1.

achievements.description: Complete all 4 scenes of stage 1 while playing as Robo Suit 2.

achievements.description: Complete all 4 scenes of stage 2 while playing as Robo Suit 2.

achievements.title: Prepare to Meet Your Maker!
achievements.description: Complete all 4 scenes of stage 3 while playing as Robo Suit 2.

achievements.description: Complete all 4 scenes of stage 1 without using any continues.

achievements.description: Complete all 4 scenes of stage 2 without using any continues.

achievements.title: I'm Taking My Lab Back Whether You Like It or Not!
achievements.description: Complete all 4 scenes of stage 3 without using any continues.

achievements.description: Complete scene 4 of stage 1 without dying.

achievements.description: Complete scene 4 of stage 2 without dying.

achievements.description: Complete scene 4 of stage 3 without dying.

achievements.title: I Am the Superior Scientist!
achievements.description: Defeat Mandark while playing as Dexter.

achievements.title: Your Robots Are No Match for My Mech!
achievements.description: Defeat Mandark while playing as Robo Suit 1.

achievements.description: Defeat Mandark without dying.

achievements.title: I'll Show You!
achievements.description: Defeat Mandark without continuing.

achievements.title: Violence Is Not the Answer
achievements.description: Complete any scene without shooting.

achievements.title: The Sneaky Scientist
achievements.description: Without killing any enemies, grab all of the codes in the first scene of stage 1.

achievements.title: Crushed It!
achievements.description: Beat the default high score of 10,000 points.

achievements.title: Try to Beat That!
achievements.description: Score 100,000 or more points.

achievements.title: The Unstoppable Genius
achievements.description: Score 250,000 or more points.

achievements.title: Scientist Supremacy!
achievements.description: Score 400,000 or more points.
